auth_legal_text: By continuing, you agree to our <button type='button' class='font-bold hover:underline' onClick='__TERMS__'>Terms of Use</button> and <button type='button' class='font-bold hover:underline' onClick='__PRIVACY__'>Privacy Policy</button>.
clear_tool_msg: Are you sure you want to delete all data for this tool? This action cannot be undone.
decision_desc: Select the best alternative by scoring options against specific criteria (1-10).
decision_empty: No criteria or options added yet.
delete_project_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this project and all its tool data? This action cannot be undone.
des_desc: Plan the architecture and technical details.
desc_placeholder: You can write detailed explanations or notes about this goal or task here...
do_desc: Test the plan on a small scale
eod_desc: Plan and prioritize your top 6 goals for tomorrow at the end of the day.
eod_empty: You haven't planned any goals for tomorrow yet.
eod_max_limit: Add as many ideas as you want; the most important 6 will automatically become your focus.
flowchart_desc: Map out process steps and decision points.
fta_desc: Analyze root causes of failures using AND/OR logic gates
hero_subtitle: Map out complex workflows, find root causes, and maximize productivity with Solvinger.
histogram_delete_analysis: Are you sure you want to delete this Histogram analysis?
histogram_desc: Bar graph showing the distribution of continuous data.
histogram_empty: Add classes and frequencies first to generate the chart.
ishi_desc: Systematically analyze root causes based on 6M categories.
ishi_empty: You haven't started an analysis yet.
ishi_placeholder: Type the problem to analyze here...
ishi_subtitle: Analyze root causes based on 6M categories.
landing_cta_subtitle: Solving problems and making strategic decisions has never been easier. Try it free with your team.
landing_tools_subtitle: Whether you're doing root cause analysis or risk assessment, all the modern management tools your project needs are at your fingertips on a single platform.
notepad_desc: Safely store your ideas, drafts, and notes.
notepad_no_notes: No notes created yet. Add a new note from the top left.
pareto_delete_analysis: Are you sure you want to delete this Pareto analysis?
pareto_desc: Analysis method determining that 80% of problems are due to 20% of causes.
pareto_empty: Add categories and frequencies first to generate the chart.
pdca_desc: Ensure continuous improvement with Plan, Do, Check, Act phases.
pdca_empty: You haven't started a PDCA cycle yet.
pdca_placeholder: Type the goal or process to improve here...
pdca_subtitle: Follow Plan, Do, Check, Act steps for continuous improvement.
req_desc: Define what the system should do.
swot_desc: Evaluate your project's strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats.
swot_example_hint: You can load an example template to see how a SWOT analysis is done through a real scenario.
swot_example_o1: Increasing number of university students in the area
swot_example_o2: Growing demand on food delivery apps
swot_example_t1: A large chain café opening on the next street
swot_example_t2: Fluctuations in coffee bean import prices
swot_example_title: Example: Opening a New Coffee Shop
swot_no_analysis: You haven't started a SWOT analysis yet.
swot_subtitle: Map the strategic advantages and disadvantages of your project.
ver_desc: Verify that the system meets requirements.
wbs_desc: Break your project down into smaller, manageable parts.
welcome_msg: Log in to save your projects to the cloud.
wf_desc: Manage your project sequentially with Requirements, Design, Implementation, Verification, and Maintenance phases.
wf_empty: You haven't started a Waterfall project yet.
wf_hld_desc: Design the overall architecture and relations between components.
wf_lld_desc: Detail the physical design specs, hardware, and software technologies.
wf_placeholder: Type your Waterfall project name here...
wf_req_locked: Requirements are completed and cannot be modified.
wf_subtitle: Apply the traditional phase-based project management model.
whys_desc: Ask 'Why?' consecutively to get to the root cause of the problem.
whys_empty: You haven't started a 5 Whys analysis yet.
whys_empty_hint: Start your analysis by adding the first "Main Problem" node to the canvas.
whys_example_problem: Example: Customer deliveries are constantly delayed
whys_example_solution: Solution: Tie the maintenance schedule to a digital calendar
whys_example_w1: Why? Because the product is handed to the courier late
whys_example_w2: Why? Because the packaging service works slowly
whys_example_w3: Why? Because the packaging machine breaks down frequently
whys_example_w4: Why? The machine's periodic maintenance was not done (Root Cause)
whys_root_placeholder: Solution plan for the root cause...
whys_subtitle: Ask why 5 times to find the root cause of the problem.
ws_subtitle: Combine project management and problem-solving methodologies in one platform. Select a tool to start.
auth_too_many_requests: Too many requests, try again later
auth_popup_closed: Sign-in popup was closed by the user
auth_popup_blocked: Sign-in popup was blocked by the browser
